_featureMathV2Note: FeatureMath v2 adds cruise, antelite (display OVERBOOST) and super (display NITRO OVERDRIVE) to the shipped base+bonus package. base and bonus lookup tables are byte-identical to the pre-v2 release.

cruiseMode.effect: low volatility (SD ~11.1x vs base ~17.3x): more frequent smaller wins, same 96.35% RTP

nitroOverdrive.effect: guaranteed feature entry with the Overdrive meter pre-revved to 5x from the first free spin
